gloss_en: train that stops at every station

to get closer to the present day
a long time (since the last time)

to change (e.g. of state, affiliation, scenery, etc.)
to spread (of a fire, smell, etc.)
to be permeated (by a color or scent)

thing inside one's body believed to influence one's thoughts and feelings
mushi (type of game played with a stripped deck)
self-appointed enforcer (of a rule, standard, etc.)
to remove (food, etc. from table or altar)
to keep on playing after one has formed a scoring combination with captured cards

adds the connotation of an action happening strongly or violently
(in gagaku or noh) end of a song

to be (in a state, condition, etc.)
to place, or raise, person A to a post or status B

creates a humble verb (after a noun prefixed with "o" or "go")
